matches.x: “Ye Are the Temple of God” By President Boyd K. Packer Acting President of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles Your body really is the instrument of your mind and the foundation of your character. profit. Let us desire and pray for these things which will do us good, trusting in the Lord, seeking to know and do his will, and we shall come off conquerors and be crowned with crowns of glory, immortality, and eternal lives in the celestial kingdom

Take heed to thyself that thou offer not thy burnt offerings in every place that thou seest:
